nodes.name: ExecutionPolicyEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable editor component for configuring execution policies on agents or projects, providing form controls for budget limits, retry settings, and concurrency rules.

nodes.name: GoalDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Full-page detail view for a single goal, combining title/description inline editing, sub-goal tree, linked projects, and a slide-in properties panel powered by React Query.

nodes.name: GoalPropertiesToggleButton
nodes.summary: Small exported button component that toggles the visibility of the Goal properties side panel.

nodes.name: GoalDetail
nodes.summary: Main goal detail page component; fetches goal, sub-goals, and linked projects, then renders inline editors, a tabbed view, and a slide-in properties panel.

nodes.name: GoalList.tsx
nodes.summary: List view component that renders all goals for a company with filtering, sorting, and navigation links to individual goal detail pages.

nodes.name: IssueDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Comprehensive issue detail page integrating optimistic comment handling, live run tracking, keyboard shortcuts, inline editing, approvals, and breadcrumb management through multiple React Query hooks.

nodes.name: IssueDetailComments.tsx
nodes.summary: Tabbed comment thread sub-component for the issue detail view, handling optimistic comment creation, editing, deletion, and real-time updates.

nodes.name: IssueDetailDocuments.tsx
nodes.summary: Document attachments tab for the issue detail page, allowing users to view, upload, and remove files associated with an issue.

nodes.name: IssueDetailRuns.tsx
nodes.summary: Run history tab for the issue detail page, listing past agent execution runs associated with the issue with status and timing information.

nodes.name: IssueList.tsx
nodes.summary: Full-featured issue list component with filtering by status, assignee, project, and priority, rendering rows via IssueListRow with pagination support.

nodes.name: IssueListRow.tsx
nodes.summary: Single row component for the issue list, displaying issue title, status badge, assignee avatar, priority indicator, and quick-action controls.

nodes.name: IssueMentions.tsx
nodes.summary: Component for displaying issues that mention the current issue, rendering backlinks and contextual previews for cross-issue references.

nodes.name: IssueStatusSelect.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown select component for changing an issue's status, presenting all valid status transitions with icons and labels.

nodes.name: IssueSubtaskList.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the subtask checklist within an issue detail, supporting inline creation, completion toggling, and reordering of child issues.

nodes.name: IssueWorkspaceDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Detail panel for the workspace associated with an issue run, displaying file trees, environment variables, and execution context for a specific agent run.

nodes.name: MembersTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Members management tab component used in project and company settings, listing current members, their roles, and providing invite and removal actions.

nodes.name: NavSidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Primary application navigation sidebar rendering company-scoped links to Issues, Goals, Projects, Agents, Routines, and Settings with active route highlighting.

nodes.name: NewIssueModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for creating new issues, with fields for title, description, project, assignee, priority, and optional agent trigger configuration.

nodes.name: PersonalTokensTab.tsx
nodes.summary: User settings tab for managing personal API tokens, supporting token generation, display, copying, and revocation.

nodes.name: PluginDetailModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal displaying detailed information about a plugin including description, version, configuration schema, and install/uninstall actions.

nodes.name: PluginList.tsx
nodes.summary: List component rendering available and installed plugins with search/filter capability and action buttons to open the plugin detail modal.

nodes.name: PluginsTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Company or project settings tab for plugin management, combining the PluginList and PluginDetailModal into a coordinated UI for browsing and configuring plugins.

nodes.name: ProjectDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Full project detail page with tabbed navigation covering overview, issue list, workspaces, configuration, and budget, wiring together React Query data with plugin slot support.

nodes.name: ProjectList.tsx
nodes.summary: Grid or list view of all company projects with status badges, description previews, and links to individual project detail pages.

nodes.name: ResourceMemberships.tsx
nodes.summary: Generic membership management component for resources (projects, agents) that handles adding, removing, and listing members with role selection.

nodes.name: RoutineDetail.tsx
nodes.summary: Detailed configuration page for a routine, covering schedule editing, environment variables, agent assignment, trigger webhook setup, and run history tabs.

nodes.name: RoutineList.tsx
nodes.summary: Routine list row component and helper utilities for displaying individual scheduled routines with status toggles, run-now buttons, and archive actions.

nodes.name: RoutineListRow
nodes.summary: Exported row component rendering a single routine with project/agent context, last-run timestamp, status toggle, run-now button, and archive action menu.

nodes.name: formatLastRunTimestamp
nodes.summary: Utility that formats a routine last-run timestamp value to a locale string.

nodes.name: formatRoutineRunStatus
nodes.summary: Utility that formats a routine run status string for display by normalizing underscores.
